title: 日本ダービーの後に・挽回に向けて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't win, but even so, Vodka showed her
determination and ran a great race!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Just... a little more!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I was so close! Augh! Damn it! Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Everyone was wicked fast... The Derby's no joke...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is what I've been workin' for this whole time...
Augh!
choice_data_list: You did a great job, Vodka.
You did a great job, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I know. But I'm still frustrated... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No... I... I don't even know why I'm crying.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All I know is I'm glad I ran... Augh! Why does the
sky have to be so blue?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka only had one shot at the Derby, and she
ran it through to the end without compromising
her ideals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it was the right choice, but at the
very least, Vodka made good on her dream of
running in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At the press conference...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The winner was really amazin'! There's no denyin'
that. That said...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Who knows what's gonna happen next, though?
You see, I've got the perfect plan to get even
better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Somehow, I have a bad feeling about this.

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text: Could you share it with us, Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In order to hone my skills... I'm gonna run
internationally!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll get super strong and make everyone eat my
dust!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Run... internationally? Standing behind the
reporters, I put my head in my hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry about earlier! I didn't mean
anything by it. I just...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I got caught up in the moment! I got too excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering Vodka's skills, it'd probably be best
to go back to the Tiara tour and get ready to run
in the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we tried to squeeze an international race in, I
can't even begin to imagine the burden it'll put on
her.
choice_data_list: Do you really want to go abroad?
Do you really want to go abroad?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I said it, so there's no takin' it back now. I
don't wanna take it back either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna be that Umamusume who just did
"okay" in the Derby... And this is the only way
forward I can think of.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer? ...No?
choice_data_list:
...Maybe we do the Shuka Sho after we get
back?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No! Not the Shuka Sho. I said I wanna go
abroad...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait. After we get back?
choice_data_list: Yeah. After you're done running internationally.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's right! This is how it's gotta be, partner!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You really get me! And you're right, it'll be
autumn when we get back!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's go abroad! And then I'll come back and
conquer the Shuka Sho as a world-famous
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so our agenda changes to include running
internationally.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Lemme say it one more time. Thanks for letting
me run the Derby, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But our journey ain't over yet! The two of us can
go even further!
